---
title: "Keefe Reuther"
about:
  id: intro
  template: solana
  image: /assets/keefe2.jpg
  image-alt: "Headshot of Keefe Reuther"
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7638-8521
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/keefereuther
    - icon: huggingface
      text: Hugging Face
      href: https://huggingface.co/keefereuther
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@TheQuestionsLab
    - text: SABER GenAI
      href: https://saberbio.wildapricot.org/generative-AI-SIG
listing:
  id: news
  type: table
  fields: [title, date]
  sort: date desc
  contents:
    - "docs/blog/posts/*/index.qmd"
    - "docs/scholarship/papers/*.qmd"
    - "docs/scholarship/presentations/*.qmd"
  sort-ui: false
  max-items: 8
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  feed: true
  table-hover: true
  table-striped: true
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() { forceScrollToTop(); });
window.addEventListener("load", function() { forceScrollToTop(); });
function forceScrollToTop() {
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);
  var scrollInterval;
  var scrollAttempts = 0;
  scrollInterval = setInterval(function() {
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
    scrollAttempts++;
    if (scrollAttempts >= 20) { clearInterval(scrollInterval); }
  }, 100);
}
setTimeout(function() { window.scrollTo(0, 0); }, 0);
</script>
```

::: {#intro}
**I build open-source AI tools for undergraduate biology and study how students and instructors actually use them.**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Assistant Teaching Professor in the [Department of Ecology, Behavior & Evolution](https://biology.ucsd.edu/research/academic-departments/ebe/) at UC San Diego. My work runs on two tracks: building generative AI tools that support active learning, and studying what actually happens when those tools land in real classrooms. I also teach experimental design, statistics, and data science — the craft of turning biological questions into rigorous answers.

Start with my [AI tools](/docs/genai/tools/index.qmd), [scholarship](/docs/scholarship/index.qmd), or [blog](/docs/blog/index.qmd) — or [get in touch](/docs/about/contact/index.qmd) about a workshop, collaboration, or help setting up one of the tools in your course.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
:::

## Recent Posts & Publications

::: {#news}
:::
